nodes.label: XC Gradient
nodes.description: Early-stage B2B industrial SaaS company building private AI systems for European manufacturing SMEs.

nodes.label: Executive Office
nodes.description: Executive planning area covering strategic vision, board updates, and the master roadmap.

nodes.label: Operations (COO)
nodes.description: Operations domain covering systems, platform configuration, and workspace setup.

nodes.label: Technical (CTO)
nodes.description: Function responsible for architecture, engineering standards, and security.

nodes.label: Financial (CFO)
nodes.description: Function responsible for fundraising, the data room, and fiscal health.

nodes.label: Legal (CLO)
nodes.description: Function responsible for contracts, intellectual property, and corporate compliance.

nodes.label: Marketing (CMO)
nodes.description: Function responsible for brand identity, collateral, and market research.

nodes.label: Sales (CRO)
nodes.description: Function responsible for leads, partnerships, and revenue models.

nodes.label: HR & People
nodes.description: Function responsible for talent, culture, and onboarding.

nodes.label: Oriol Farrés i Vilar
nodes.description: CEO/CFO and founder; owns company strategy, Notion structure, client relationships, and thesis-to-product translation.

nodes.label: Arnau Noguer
nodes.description: CTO/AI and founder; owns the RAG pipeline, ontology layer, and deployment runbook.

nodes.label: Adam Sarrate
nodes.description: COO/CISO and founder; owns topology, security architecture, and client deployment conversations.

nodes.label: Dr. Lluís Padró
nodes.description: UPC-FIB supervisor for the master's thesis that formalizes XC Gradient's core technical IP.

nodes.label: Xavier Vera
nodes.description: CEO contact at Paver during the PoC demo stage.

nodes.label: European Manufacturing SMEs
nodes.description: Primary customer segment: 20-200 employee industrial SMEs underserved by enterprise software vendors.

nodes.label: Invisible Operational Knowledge
nodes.description: Operational knowledge trapped in manuals, logs, PDFs, and technician memory rather than searchable systems.

nodes.label: Product Vision
nodes.description: Make fragmented manufacturing knowledge visible and actionable through private AI, real-time OEE visibility, and near-zero diagnosis time.

nodes.label: Depth-First SME Entry
nodes.description: Go-to-market strategy of entering one department deeply, proving value, then expanding inside the plant.

nodes.label: Bootstrap-First Funding Strategy
nodes.description: Remain self-funded until major customer traction, with a Seed round planned after 100+ paying clients.

nodes.label: Proof-of-Concept Phase
nodes.description: Current operating phase focused on pilot implementations, validation, and learning before broader rollout.

nodes.label: 2026 Annual Goal
nodes.description: Constitute XC Gradient with 10 paying clients by Q4 2026.

nodes.label: Q2 2026 OKRs
nodes.description: Quarterly objectives focused on proving the product on real industrial data.

nodes.label: Phase 0: Ignition
nodes.description: Initial readiness phase focused on installing the operating system and defining the demo scope.

nodes.label: Phase 1: PoC Execution
nodes.description: Execution phase focused on producing measurable client outcomes.

nodes.label: Phase 2: Pipeline Building
nodes.description: Commercial phase focused on securing commitments before legal constitution.

nodes.label: Phase 3: Constitution + Launch
nodes.description: Launch phase focused on becoming a constituted company with paying clients and growing ARR.

nodes.label: A Score
nodes.description: Measured RAG performance metric used to validate PoC quality on client corpora.

nodes.label: Pipeline Conversations per Week
nodes.description: Pre-revenue growth metric for qualified customer conversations.

nodes.label: LOI Count
nodes.description: Number of LOIs or verbal commitments used as the Phase 2 north star.

nodes.label: ARR
nodes.description: Primary growth metric for the real-company launch phase.

nodes.label: Company Constitution
nodes.description: Legal incorporation milestone required for formal launch.

nodes.label: Thesis Defense
nodes.description: Academic milestone used as a credibility asset and builder-to-seller phase gate.

nodes.label: NEON
nodes.description: Active Q2 cross-founder project for PoC delivery and pipeline development.

nodes.label: CORE
nodes.description: Permanent operations and administration project bucket outside NEON scope.

nodes.label: Notion OS
nodes.description: XC Gradient's Notion workspace, the structured operating system and long-term source of truth for planning and knowledge.

nodes.label: Discord
nodes.description: Ephemeral working-memory tool used for daily communication and bot interaction.

nodes.label: Drive
nodes.description: Binary storage layer for presentations, contracts, invoices, and large files.

nodes.label: Discord /update Bot
nodes.description: Daily founder interface for task completion, tomorrow planning, milestone adjustment, and Notion writes.

nodes.label: Notion Polling Daemon
nodes.description: Background automation that polls Notion and reacts to changes in tasks, decisions, pipeline, and finance.

nodes.label: Decision Log
nodes.description: Permanent record of significant company decisions.

nodes.label: PoC Pipeline
nodes.description: Pipeline database tracking prospective clients from identification to paying customer.

nodes.label: Execution Log
nodes.description: Append-only operational log written by the bot for daily execution and milestone progress.

nodes.label: Company Calendar
nodes.description: Shared company calendar for milestones, meetings, and external deadlines relevant to all founders.

nodes.label: Private AI Knowledge Layer
nodes.description: Core product layer embedded into client workflows to turn plant knowledge into private, actionable answers and insights.

nodes.label: Private Client Container
nodes.description: Per-client isolated data container used for ingestion, retrieval, and local inference without shared data exposure.

nodes.label: Client Data Sovereignty
nodes.description: Client manufacturing data stays isolated and is never sent to external AI providers.

nodes.label: Real-Time OEE Dashboard
nodes.description: Interactive plant map showing per-machine OEE with breakdown by availability, efficiency, and quality.

nodes.label: RAG Pipeline
nodes.description: Core retrieval and diagnosis system used for PoCs and industrial knowledge access on client corpora.

nodes.label: Unstructured-to-Structured Data Pipeline
nodes.description: Ingestion and indexing pipeline that converts legacy documents and logs into searchable operational knowledge.

nodes.label: Automated Machine State Reporting
nodes.description: System for generating maintenance, condition, and OEE trend reports on demand or on schedule.

nodes.label: LLM-Assisted Error Documentation
nodes.description: Conversational workflow that turns technician incident resolution into correctly formatted maintenance records.

nodes.label: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
nodes.description: Core plant performance metric broken into availability, efficiency, and quality.

nodes.label: Mean Time to Repair (MTTR)
nodes.description: Downtime metric dominated by diagnosis time in the target SME context.

nodes.label: Domain Ontology
nodes.description: Manufacturing-domain ontology that maps machine types, failure modes, and parameter families inside each client account.

nodes.label: Per-Client Vector Store
nodes.description: Isolated retrieval index for each client account.

nodes.label: Local LLM Inference
nodes.description: On-prem inference layer that answers industrial questions without external API calls.

nodes.label: Markov + Choquet Reranking
nodes.description: Post-retrieval optimization method that ranks candidate context windows using a Markov chain and Choquet integral.

nodes.label: S-QDoRA
nodes.description: Sparse Quantized DoRA fine-tuning method for client-specific adaptation on a shared quantized base model.

nodes.label: Speculative Decoding
nodes.description: Latency optimization technique that uses a draft model to accelerate target-model generation.

nodes.label: On-Prem Deployment Runbook
nodes.description: Installable deployment guide for client sites, including hardware requirements, private container setup, and integrations.

nodes.label: XCGradient Infrastructure OS
nodes.description: Source-of-truth document and operating model for standardized infrastructure.

nodes.label: Brand Assets Repository
nodes.description: Central repository for logos, colors, fonts, and other branding assets.

nodes.label: Docker Standard
nodes.description: Requirement that every internal tool be containerized for production readiness.

nodes.label: CI/CD Pipeline
nodes.description: Automated testing and linting gate for merges to main.

nodes.label: GitHub Container Registry
nodes.description: Registry used to host production container images.

nodes.label: XCG Bot
nodes.description: Discord AI operations service maintained as an internal tool.

nodes.label: Hardware Management
nodes.description: Hardware health monitoring service.

nodes.label: Decfa PoC
nodes.description: Precision turning / CNC machining PoC used to validate diagnosis and RAG performance on real industrial data.

nodes.label: Paver PoC
nodes.description: Production-plant PoC focused on OEE visibility, knowledge access, and maintenance documentation.

nodes.label: NIS2 Compliance Checklist
nodes.description: Draft compliance asset used in security and sales conversations.

nodes.label: Fundraising
nodes.description: Capital-raising activities and investor process management.

nodes.label: Data Room
nodes.description: Repository of company materials for financing and diligence.

nodes.label: Fiscal Health
nodes.description: Financial condition and sustainability of the company.

nodes.label: Contracts
nodes.description: Commercial and operational agreements managed by legal.

nodes.label: Intellectual Property
nodes.description: Protection and governance of company IP.

nodes.label: Corporate Compliance
nodes.description: Corporate legal and compliance obligations.

nodes.label: Brand Identity
nodes.description: Definition and stewardship of the company brand.

nodes.label: Collateral
nodes.description: Marketing and sales-support materials.

nodes.label: Market Research
nodes.description: Research into market conditions, segments, and positioning.

nodes.label: Leads
nodes.description: Prospective customers and lead pipeline inputs.

nodes.label: Partnerships
nodes.description: Channel, strategic, or commercial partnerships.

nodes.label: Revenue Models
nodes.description: Commercial monetization structures for XC Gradient's product and services.

nodes.label: Talent
nodes.description: Hiring and talent development responsibilities.

nodes.label: Culture
nodes.description: Organizational culture and people practices.

nodes.label: Onboarding
nodes.description: Employee onboarding process and enablement.
